title: OpenShulk
description: OpenShulk lets you open shulker boxes directly from your inventory—just right-click and access their contents without placing them in the world.
body:
**OpenShulk** is a lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin that lets players open shulker boxes directly from their inventory, no need to place them in the world first. Just right-click a shulker box, and a new GUI will appear for easy access. **Key Features** * Open shulker boxes without placing them * Fully server-side, no client mods required * Lightweight and server-friendly * Works automatically with no commands or configuration needed **Functionality** In vanilla Minecraft, accessing a shulker box requires placing it in the world first, which can be cumbersome, especially in tight spaces or when managing inventory on the go. OpenShulk streamlines this process by allowing players to open shulker boxes directly from their inventory. Just right-click the item to view and manage its contents instantly. **Installation** OpenShulk is a server-side plugin. Simply drop it in your `plugins` folder and reload your server. No client installation is necessary. **Disclaimer** OpenShulk works with standard shulker boxes in inventory. Compatibility with modded shulker-like items may vary depending on how those mods handle inventories. --- **Credits** Special thanks to my girlfriend for making the project icon!

🛠 Support & Bug Reports

Found a bug or need help setting up the plugin?
Report issues directly on Discord.
